channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran threatens to strike Gulf energy facilities after South Pars attack
item.description: Qatar foreign ministry spokesman slams Israeli attack on Iran's offshore gasfield as 'dangerous, irresponsible step'.

item.title: How the killing of Iran’s Ali Larijani could impact the war
item.description: How will the killing of Ali Larijani impact Iran’s leadership and the country’s security?

item.title: How Dubai and UAE are being affected by Iran attacks and US-Israeli war
item.description: How Dubai and UAE are being affected by Iran attacks and US-Israeli war

item.title: Israel says it killed Iranian intelligence chief Khatib
item.description: Israel’s Defence Minister Israel Katz said an overnight strike killed Iran’s Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib.

item.title: Iran announces arrests, says US and Israel suffering ‘defeats’
item.description: Hundreds have been arrested as Iran cracks down on 'traitors' following killing of Larijani, Soleimani.

item.title: Iran holds funerals for officials Larijani and Soleimani
item.description: Iranians have attended funeral processions for senior security officials Ali Larijani and Gholamreza Soleimani.

item.title: Why did Trump’s counterterrorism chief resign over Iran war?
item.description: US counterterrorism chief Joe Kent has resigned over Washington’s war on Iran, saying he cannot support the conflict.

item.title: Not just energy: How the Iran war could trigger a global food crisis
item.description: A critical fertiliser shortage threatens global food security amid Iran war.

item.title: UN revises Kabul rehab strike toll as Pakistan denies targeting civilians
item.description: Disputed toll and competing accounts of strike deepen crisis between Islamabad and Kabul.

item.title: Turkiye says NATO bringing in more defences after missile interceptions
item.description: NATO to deploy a new Patriot missile defence unit to southern Turkiye's Incirlik Air Base.
